title: Goodyear 2m 400amp Booster Cables - Jump Leads Long| Powerful Coil Spring Clamps| Colour-coded Clamp| Zipped Carry Bag Included| Fully Insulated Length Cable| Suitable For Cars And Vehicles 3000CC
features: Heavy-Duty 400Amp Performance: The Goodyear 400Amp HD Booster Cables are designed to provide powerful and reliable performance, ensuring your vehicle gets the boost it needs. These cables can efficiently jump-start cars and vehicles up to 3000CC, making them ideal for a wide range of applications, from compact cars to larger vehicles.

Extended 2m Length for Versatility: With a generous 2-meter cable length, these jump leads offer greater flexibility and ease of use, allowing you to reach battery terminals even in awkward or tight spaces. This extended length ensures that you can connect vehicles without needing to be in close proximity, adding convenience in various situations.

Powerful Coil Spring Clamps: The heavy-duty coil spring clamps provide a strong and secure connection to battery terminals, ensuring optimal conductivity and reducing the risk of slippage during use. These clamps are designed to maintain a firm grip, allowing for consistent power transfer during the jump-start process.

Colour-Coded Clamps for Safety: Safety is a top priority with these booster cables, which feature colour-coded clamps (red for positive and black for negative) to help prevent accidental polarity mix-ups. Convenient Zipped Carry Bag Included: For easy storage and transport, these booster cables come with a durable zipped carry bag that keeps the cable protected

Fully Insulated Cable for Protection: The Goodyear booster cables are fully insulated, offering enhanced protection against electrical shocks and ensuring user safety during operation. The high-quality insulation also helps protect the cables from wear and tear, extending their lifespan and making them a reliable choice for long-term use.
description: Goodyear 2m 400amp HD Booster Cables are the ultimate solution for jump-starting your vehicle with confidence and ease. Designed to handle the toughest of jobs, these heavy-duty booster cables are perfect for cars and vehicles up to 3000CC, ensuring you're never left stranded due to a dead battery. The 2-meter length provides the perfect balance of reach and portability, allowing you to connect between vehicles even in tricky parking situations. Powerful Coil Spring Clamps ensure a secure and strong connection to your battery terminals. The clamps are designed with a firm grip to stay in place during the jump-start process, minimizing the risk of slippage or disconnection. The color-coded clamps (red for positive and black for negative) make it easy to connect to the correct terminals, even if you're not an expert in car maintenance. The cables themselves are fully insulated, providing an extra layer of safety against electrical shocks and ensuring that the power is delivered efficiently to jump-start your vehicle. The heavy-duty 400amp capacity is more than enough to handle the needs of most cars, SUVs, and smaller trucks, delivering a powerful surge of energy that will get your engine running in no time. Convenience is key, and the Goodyear HD Booster Cables come with a zipped carry bag included. This makes it easy to store the cables in your trunk or garage without them getting tangled or damaged. The compact size of the carry bag means it won't take up much space, but it will always be there when you need it.
